# Auto Promotion PR (Dev -> Main)

This PR was created or updated automatically after new commits landed in `dev`. The required `Quality` and `Security` checks must pass here before promotion into `main`.

## Release Checklist

- [ ] Confirm all required checks passed
- [ ] Review release impact and changelog
- [ ] Approve promotion into `main`

## Expected gates for merge into `main`

- Quality / Backend Lint
- Quality / Backend Unit Tests
- Quality / Backend OpenAPI
- Quality / Frontend Lint
- Quality / Frontend Unit Tests
- Quality / Frontend Validate
- Security / SAST
- Security / SBOM
- Security / SCA
- Security / Summary
